## Checklist

- [ ] This is a substance improvement (mental model, worked example, senior trap, correction), not a style nit.
- [ ] If I'm changing a claim, I've linked a **primary source**.
- [ ] It keeps the answer-first, senior, dated-2026 voice.
- [ ] It keeps the domain `https://landed.jobs` in any CTA.
